summary: US-001 workspace is fully initialized and all quality gates pass. The Vite + TypeScript workspace includes: package.json with all required scripts (dev, build, preview, lint, typecheck, test, test:e2e), strict tsconfig.json, Vite/Vitest/Playwright/ESLint configs, index.html entry point with canvas#cathedral, src/main.ts with visible placeholder rendering, directory scaffolding (src/domain, src/metrics, src/render, src/ui, public, tests, docs/adr), probe asset in public/, and comprehensive test coverage (22 unit tests, 3 E2E tests). Fixed .gitignore to remove erroneous LOCK* pattern that would have excluded package-lock.json.
